acquisition method: operated in standard data-dependent acquisition mode controlled by Xcalibur version 4.0.27.19.
alkylation reagent: the free thiols were then alkylated with freshly prepared iodoacetamide
alkylation concentration: added to give 10 mM final concentration, for 30 min with shaking in the dark.
instrument: analyzed on-line by using a Q-Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: the raw data were analyzed using PEAKS Studio X
reduction reagent: the disulfide bonds were reduced using TCEP, tris(2-carboxyethyl) phosphine
reduction concentration: at 5 mM total concentration for 30 min.
